manifesto_subtitle: Less noise. More signal. Real tech intelligence.
manifesto_problem_p2: 90% of published content is noise — marketing pressure, repetition, empty buzzwords.
manifesto_problem_p3: Decision-makers, engineers, architects — everyone wastes precious time filtering.
manifesto_problem_p4: Nobody has time to read everything. But everyone needs to understand.
manifesto_response_p1: EDGE is not just another aggregator.
manifesto_response_p2: It's an intelligent filter — a self-improving system that ingests, sorts, synthesizes, and publishes only the tech news that matters.
manifesto_response_p3: Every article goes through an LLM panel that evaluates relevance, depth, and impact.
manifesto_response_p4: The result: a clean daily digest — no noise, no ads, no compromises.
manifesto_axes_intro: Three lenses, one mission: understanding the tech that transforms the world.
manifesto_axis_edge_desc: Processing at the edge. Distribution. Decentralized infrastructure. What happens at the network's periphery is often more important than what happens at the center.
manifesto_axis_edge_detail: IoT, CDN, fog computing, 5G MEC, embedded processing — we track what brings computation closer to the user.
manifesto_axis_value_desc: Business models. ROI. New forms of tech value.
manifesto_axis_value_detail: Monetized open source, decentralized platforms, tokenization, new services — we analyze where value is created and captured.
manifesto_axis_cost_desc: Frugality. Optimization. Doing more with less.
manifesto_axis_cost_detail: FinOps, green IT, serverless, shared infrastructure — we highlight approaches that reduce waste without sacrificing performance.
manifesto_pipeline_step1_desc: Dozens of tech sources are continuously monitored — blogs, journals, research papers, GitHub repos.
manifesto_pipeline_step2_desc: A panel of language models scores each article against our three pillars. Relevance scoring, buzz detection, duplicate elimination.
manifesto_pipeline_step3_desc: Top articles are synthesized: summary, key quotes, detailed scores. The essentials in a few lines.
manifesto_pipeline_step4_desc: The digest goes live. Clean. Readable. Actionable. Every day, every week — at your pace.
manifesto_selfimprove_p2: Every interaction — reading, feedback, adjustment — feeds the scoring system.
manifesto_selfimprove_p3: Filters adjust. Relevance improves. Noise decreases.
manifesto_selfimprove_p4: This is not a static product. It's an adapting organism.
manifesto_value_transparency_desc: Code is open source. Scores are explainable. Sources are cited. No black boxes.
manifesto_value_frugality_desc: Zero proprietary licenses. Zero subscriptions. Zero unnecessary technical debt. We do more with less.
manifesto_value_independence_desc: Self-hosted. No third-party dependency. Your data stays with you.
manifesto_value_quality_desc: One relevant article is worth more than a hundred mediocre ones. We choose. That's our job.
manifesto_footer_line1: EDGE is a project incubated by DOMORIA SAS.
manifesto_footer_line2: Because tech intelligence deserves better than a social media recommendation algorithm.
digest_newsletter_cta: Get this digest by email every week
register_error: Error. Email may already be used.
trends_no_data: Not enough data to detect trends.
newsletter_success: Thanks! You'll receive our weekly digest.
no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first!
meta_description: EDGE — Self-improving tech news. Daily digest of the best tech news, filtered by AI.
